strategy.name: EMA(9/21) Cross + VWAP + RSI(14) Trend Follow — Crypto 24/7
strategy.description: Trend-following strategy for crypto. No session filter — crypto trades 24/7. EMA(9/21) cross confirms trend direction, VWAP anchors value area, RSI(14) in momentum zone confirms entry timing. 3:1 RR with 0.5% SL.

indicators.ema_9: Fast trend. EMA(9) above EMA(21) = bullish trend active.
indicators.ema_21: Slow trend. EMA(9) crossing above = uptrend confirmed.
indicators.vwap: Session anchor. Price within 2.0% of VWAP = near value, not overextended.
indicators.rsi_14: Momentum filter. 45–65 in uptrend = momentum intact. 35–55 in downtrend = momentum intact.

sessions: 24/7 — no session filter. Crypto moves at all hours.
risk_rules: Max trade size capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD
Max trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY
